title: read_range
description: Read cell values from a Google Sheets spreadsheet or Excel file. Returns raw values, formatted values, or formulas for the specified range.

spreadsheet_id.description: Spreadsheet ID (Google Sheets) or file path (Excel)

sheet_name.description: Sheet/tab name (alternative to including in range)

major_dimension.description: Whether to return data as rows or columns

include_headers.description: Treat first row as headers and return as key-value objects
